events.title: Full Moon Ceremony — West African Tribal Dance
events.description: A full moon gathering at the School of Unified Healing rooted in West African rhythm and ceremony. Doors open at 6 PM with tea and quiet arrival; at 6:30 PM the djembe, kora, and kalimba take the space as live West African tribal dance begins. At 8 PM a hot-and-raw organic dinner buffet unfolds by communal fire, followed by open sharing and close at 9:30 PM. Same venue and organiser as the New Moon Bhakti Kirtan series — different moon, different modality.
events.short_description: Full moon ceremony: West African tribal dance, live percussion (djembe/kora/kalimba), organic dinner by fire.
events.venue_address: Jl. Subak Sok Wayah, Ubud, Kec. Tegallalang, Bali 80571
events.price_info: ~IDR 220k presale / ~IDR 320k door (estimated, same organiser as New Moon Bhakti Kirtan Jul 6)

events.title: Dissolve :: Eros — Contact to Ecstatic Dance
events.description: A dedicated Tuesday evening session at Paradiso Ubud for contact improvisation moving into ecstatic dance. The floor opens at 6 PM for a free-flow contact jam before a curated DJ-led ecstatic dance set takes over. Intimate and capped — a distinct offering from the 3 PM Moving Waves 5Rhythms session that shares the Tuesday calendar.
events.short_description: Weekly Tuesday contact jam flowing into DJ-led ecstatic dance at Paradiso. 6–8 PM.
